title: Bihar Board 10th and 12th Compartment Exam Date 2026 OUT: Full Timetable

detail.title: Bihar Board 10th and 12th Compartment Exam Date 2026 OUT: Full Timetable
detail.short_info: Bihar Board (BSEB) 10th and 12th Compartment Exam 2026 dates released. Check full timetable (May 2-11), download hall ticket, eligibility, and official links at biharboardonline.com. Exams start May 2.

sections.heading: Bihar Board 10th and 12th Compartment Exam Date 2026 OUT: Full Timetable

content.text: The Bihar School Examination Board (BSEB) has released the 10th and 12th compartment exam dates for 2026, starting May 2, 2026, with exams in two sittings daily.

Students who need to clear failed subjects can now check the official timetable on biharboardonline.com. These supplementary exams help you pass without repeating the full year. Below, you'll find the complete schedules, download steps, eligibility details, and more to prepare effectively.

rows: Elective Subjects (Higher Math, Commerce, Arabic, Persian, Sanskrit etc.)
Vocational Elective Subjects (Security, Beautician, Tourism, Retail, Electronics, IT etc.)

sections.heading: How to Download BSEB Compartment Hall Ticket 2026

items: Visit the official BSEB website: Click Here.
Click on "Compartment Exam 2026" or "Hall Ticket" link under 10th/12th section.
Enter your roll number, registration number, and date of birth.
Verify with captcha and submit.
Download and print the admit card-carry it with ID to the exam center.

content.text: Hall tickets are typically available 10-15 days before exams, so check regularly.

items: You qualify if you failed in one or two subjects in the main BSEB 10th/12th exams (2026).
Must have appeared in the regular exam; no eligibility for absentees without valid reason.
Maximum two attempts for compartment; apply within the notified window (usually post-results).
Fee: Around ₹200-500 per subject (confirm on official site).
No eligibility if you've already passed via previous compartments.

content.text: Contact BSEB helpline for case-specific queries.

sections.heading: Important Instructions for BSEB Compartment Exams 2026

items: Arrive 30 minutes early with hall ticket and photo ID (Aadhaar preferred).
No electronic devices allowed; black/blue pen only.
Exams at designated centers-check your admit card for location.
In case of clash, prioritize first sitting; report issues to invigilator.
Results expected 4-6 weeks post-exams; passing marks same as main board (33%).

content.text: Prepare by focusing on failed subjects and practicing past papers.
